style_name: high-contrast rock anime noir within dark anime with crimson red dominance
song_motif: a forced smile reflected as a split neon expression

color_rules.rule: limited-color anime palette: crimson red dominant, dark shadows, near-black backgrounds, subtle secondary reflections, silver-white rim highlights

camera_language: wide establishing anime frame with the protagonist small but clearly identifiable
close-up profile or low-angle tilt down, shallow depth isolating the face
close-up profile or low-angle tilt down, shallow depth isolating the face
dynamic forward tracking shot, low angle, strong beat-synced foreground streaks
medium close-up reflected in a dark surface with neon fracture light framing the face
intimate close-up profile shifting to a three-quarter emotional reveal
dynamic forward tracking shot, low angle, strong beat-synced foreground streaks
slow pullback from the signature prop to the full silhouette
transition_language: beat-matched impact cuts and fast reflection wipes through a forced smile reflected as a split neon expression, neon reflections, and distorted light streaks, harder contrast, impact flashes on drum accents
